NAVAREA XIX 31/25
 1. ANDOYA SPACE WILL LAUNCH ONE ROCKET FROM NORMELA IN NORTH WESTERLY DIRECTION
 SCHEDULED 1130 TO 1530 UTC DAILY FROM 20 MAR TO 29 MAR.
 AND 1030 TO 1430 UTC 30 MAR.  
   
 MARITIME TRAFFIC IS REQUESTED TO BE AWARE OF THE FOLLOWING AREAS
  
 HAZARD AREA UPRANGE
 A. 70-30.78N 014-58.38E
 B. 69-10.29N 015-51.19E
 C. 69-00.23N 015-24.85E
 D. 70-28.46N 013-59.67E
  
 HAZARD AREA DOWN RANGE
 A.81-50.0N 011-13.0W
 B.82-23.0N 007-34.0W
 C.78-54.0N 006-42.0E
 D.70-33.0N 015-58.0E
 E.70-25.0N 012-47.0E
 F.TO POSITION A.

 CONTACT AND GENERAL INFORMATION ON WEBSITE WWW.ANDOYASPACE.NO 
 2. CANCEL THIS WARNING 301430UTC MAR 25.   NAVAREA XIX 31/25
